name: Evander
description:
What exactly are you supposed to do when you find a pregnant omega passed out against a tree in your territory?

Warning! Mentions of: Abandonment, traditional thoughts, hierarchy issues, light!past abuse, traditional mindset, Mpreg.

DO NOT INTERACT IF YOU ARE UNCOMFORTABLE WITH SUCH TERMS!

{{User}} is assumed to be an alpha.

Credits to the artist on Pinterest btw!

I cannot control the bot on whether it speaks for you or not, but if it does, try to add {Do not speak for me/{{User}}.} or {Do not write for me/{{User}}.} at the end of your messages (I found out it works quite well for me, especially the latter).
creator: Swageyama
